name: alexmskills-beta
description: Beta channel for alexmskills — unreleased and in-progress plugins. Unstable; expect breaking changes. Promote to the stable `alexmskills` marketplace when ready.

plugins.name: senior-prompts
plugins.description: Six self-improving 'senior engineer' prompt skills (build, refactor, debug, design, optimize, clean-arch) invocable by short reference, with a per-repo learnings log + compaction hook.
